title: {YTP} ~ Soup or Smash Bros.
description:
And just like that, the hype train has derailed. It's a shame there were no brakes.

I usually wait a while between uploads when I finish more than one in a short time, but I couldn't resist. I spent just about all of my free time for two days whipping this up. I hope that 9 hours of editing was worth it.

Main Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j0BBGzfw0pQ

Support me: https://elliespectacular.com/support

FAQ: https://elliespectacular.com/faq
